title: cremanthodium helianthus
intro: Cremanthodium helianthus, also known as Golden Ragwort, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and edible leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cremanthodium helianthus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Cremanthodium helianthus can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
